Section Call By Semantics: Call By Reference

children.label: Section Call By Semantics: Call By Reference

children.value: This program demonstrates calling by reference in Fortran.

children.label: This program demonstrates calling by reference in Fortran.

children.value:
program call_by_reference
    implicit none
    integer :: m
    m = 5
    print *, m
    call increment(m)
    print *, m

contains

    subroutine increment(n)
        implicit none
        integer, intent(inout) :: n

        n = n + 1
    end subroutine increment

end program call_by_reference
The above program is compiled and run using Fortran Package Manager (fpm):
Build the Program using FPM (Fortran Package Manager)

program call_by_reference
    implicit none
    integer :: m
    m = 5
    print *, m
    call increment(m)
    print *, m

contains

    subroutine increment(n)
        implicit none
        integer, intent(inout) :: n

        n = n + 1
    end subroutine increment

end program call_by_reference
